prompt: Generate a technical SEO checklist for a Next.js App Router application. Include checks for sitemap, robots.txt, canonical tags, Core Web Vitals, and structured data.

mock_result.response:
Technical SEO Checklist: Next.js App Router

Sitemap:
[ ] Add /app/sitemap.ts exporting a Sitemap type
[ ] Submit sitemap URL to Google Search Console
[ ] Verify sitemap auto-updates on new page creation

robots.txt:
[ ] Add /app/robots.ts with appropriate allow/disallow rules
[ ] Disallow /api/ and /admin/ from crawlers

Canonical Tags:
[ ] Add <link rel='canonical'> via generateMetadata in each layout
[ ] Ensure no duplicate content across pagination

Core Web Vitals:
[ ] LCP < 2.5s — optimize hero images with next/image priority
[ ] INP < 200ms — defer non-critical JS, use useTransition
[ ] CLS < 0.1 — set explicit width/height on all images

Structured Data:
[ ] Add JSON-LD Organization schema to root layout
[ ] Add FAQ schema to relevant pages
[ ] Validate with Google Rich Results Test

12 total checks. Estimated implementation: 4 hours.
